description: For the laid back man of style, this Reecharge fragrance for men from reebok, has traces of aromas of spices and woods on a evening in the portico. Reminiscent of lazy evenings, this eau de toilette, bottled in a delectable flask, has tones of mint, must and eucalyptus. Quantity: 100 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
